def: A flat shape you can fold up to make a solid 3D shape.
example: Six squares in a row and column can fold into a cube.

def: One flat side of a solid shape.
The total amount of flat space on all the outside sides of a shape added together.
example: Add up the area of all 6 faces to get the surface area.

def: How much flat space is inside one shape, like a wall or a side.
example: A square that is 3 by 3 has an area of 9.
